name: skill-request
description: Proposal for a new reusable HPC skill.

name: site-adapter
description: Public local policy adapter for an HPC site or training environment.

name: bug
description: Problem with a skill, schema, CLI command, generated file, or documentation.

name: documentation
description: Documentation, examples, onboarding, or maintainer guidance.

name: schema-change
description: Change to registry schemas, generated metadata, or compatibility rules.

name: safety-review
description: Needs review for risk, privacy, shared-system impact, or high-risk behavior.

name: maturity-review
description: Review request for promoting a skill from seed to reviewed, field-tested, or maintained.

name: high-risk-skill
description: Skill may affect shared systems, admin state, security, or facility operations.

name: governance
description: Maintainer roles, review policy, maturity, releases, or community process.

name: rfc
description: Request for comments on a project-level design or policy change.

name: decision-record
description: Accepted project-level decision or architecture record.

name: good-first-issue
description: Scoped contribution suitable for a first-time contributor.

name: help-wanted
description: Maintainers would welcome external contribution or domain review.

name: ci
description: Continuous integration, GitHub Actions, Pages, or generated checks.

name: python
description: Python CLI, validation, tests, or packaging.

name: release
description: Release planning, notes, tags, or versioned registry publication.

name: question
description: Question about usage, adoption, design, or contribution process.

name: adoption
description: Public-safe report from trying the registry in a center, lab, tool project, or training program.
